title: Finally… A NotebookLM Alternative With an API
summary: Open Notebook is a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google's NotebookLM built for developers. It enables AI-driven document analysis, grounded question answering, and podcast generation from source materials with more control over data and workflows.
writeup: This video from Better Stack covers Open Notebook, a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM aimed at developers who want control over their documents, code, research, and AI workflows. It demonstrates the tool's core capabilities: document ingestion, grounded question-answering, and podcast generation from source documents. The distinguishing feature is API access, which allows Open Notebook to be integrated into custom pipelines rather than used only through a hosted interface.
